diagrams.title: Bounded Buffer Structure
diagrams.description: Circular buffer with N slots showing producer and consumer pointers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how circular buffers work and how semaphores track buffer state

diagrams.title: Dining Philosophers Setup
diagrams.description: Five philosophers around a circular table with forks between each
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing deadlock scenario and understanding fork dependencies

diagrams.title: Readers-Writers Solution Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing reader and writer entry conditions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding mutual exclusion and priority handling in readers-writers

diagrams.title: Sleeping Barber State Diagram
diagrams.description: State machine for barber and customer interactions
elements: Customer states: Arriving, Waiting, Being Served, Leaving
diagrams.purpose: Understanding producer-consumer synchronization in service scenarios
